## Collections.CacheInvalidatingResultMapWrapper.set() method

Sets a key/value pair in the map. Invalidates the cache entry for the key.

**Signature:**

```typescript
set(key: TK, value: TSRC): DetailedResult<TSRC, ResultMapResultDetail>;
```
